title: gladiolus gregarius
intro: Gladiolus gregarius, also known as the wild gladiolus or Gladiolus illyricus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of saponins and alkaloids. The health benefits of Gladiolus gregarius include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus gregarius can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of the plant's medicinal properties.
